flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Emporia State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.3k vs 3.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Emporia State University fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9k → 2.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Emporia State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Emporia State University rose 28% between 2021 and 2024 (31.7% → 40.6%).
